Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Ecdysozoa; Arthropoda; Hexapoda; Insecta; Pterygota; Neoptera; Endopterygota; Lepidoptera; Glossata; Ditrysia; Gelechioidea; Coleophoridae; Coleophora
Assembly: The assembly ilColObse1.hap1.1 is based on 91x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by Project Psyche (https://www.projectpsyche.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Chromosomes Z, W1 and W2 were identified by copy number in the diploid genome and by HiC signal. The Z chromosome appears to have gone through a recent fusion between the canonical Z chromosome and an ancestral autosome. This has also resulted in two W chromosomes being present in the genome.
